---
title: "Transcatheter Valve Intervention"
subtitle: "Mainz 2024 Fellowship Training Report"
author: "Dr. Drake Mu-Yang Hsieh, MD, PhD"
date: 2024-12-24
lang: en
---

## Table of Contents

1. [TEER](ch1-teer.qmd) — Transcatheter Edge-to-Edge Repair (Mitral & Tricuspid)
2. [TAVI in AS](ch2-tavi-as.qmd) — Transcatheter Aortic Valve Implantation for Aortic Stenosis
3. [TAVI in AR](ch3-tavi-ar.qmd) — Transcatheter Aortic Valve Implantation for Aortic Regurgitation
4. [Acknowledgements](ch4-acknowledgements.qmd)
